title: onosma microcarpa
intro: Onosma microcarpa, also known as the small-seeded Onosma, is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae, native to the mountainous regions of China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and protecting against oxidative stress, among others. Traditionally, Onosma microcarpa is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
